Package com.saxonica.ee.config

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    DynamicLoaderEE
    Specialization of DynamicLoader for use in Saxon-EE
    StandardFunctionsEE
    This class contains definitions of standard functions (that is, functions in the 'fn' namespace) that are defined in the XSLT 3.0 and XQuery 3.0 specifications, and made available in Saxon-PE and Saxon-EE.
    StyleNodeFactoryEE
    Class StyleNodeFactoryEE: Subclass of StyleNodeFactory used for Saxon-EE.
    TypeHierarchyEE
    Refinement of the TypeHierarchy class to handle function items and schema-aware types such as schema-element(A).
